blocks.title: El advenimiento del ExO Monster
blocks.md: - O la dockerización más estúpida de la historia

blocks.title: Arquitectura previa
blocks.md:
- FRONTEND
- API
- STORAGE
- BACKEND
- Tamaño: 8,5Gb
- Tiempo: 20 min

blocks.title: Hola Lenna!
blocks.md: - Ejemplo de código en python para desenfocar a Lenna

blocks.title: Diapositiva 6
blocks.md:
- #!/usr/bin/env python
- # This code blurr the "Lenna.png" image file
- import os
- from PIL import Image, ImageFilter
- # Pillow part
- in_file = "Lenna.png"
- out_file = "Lenna-blurred.png"
- original = Image.open(in_file)
- blurred = original.filter(ImageFilter.BLUR)
- blurred.save(out_file)
- print("Original image: %d" % os.stat(in_file).st_size)
- print("Blurred image: %d" % os.stat(out_file).st_size)

blocks.title: Dockerizemos hermanos
blocks.md: - Diferentes formas de dockerizar nuestra aplicación

blocks.title: Diapositiva 8
blocks.md:
- FROM debian:stretch AS example
- COPY . .
- RUN apt-get update && \
- apt-get install -y \
- python3 \
- python3-pip
- RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
- RUN python3 test.py
- Tamaño: 515MB
- Tiempo: 57s

blocks.title: Diapositiva 9
blocks.md:
- FROM debian:stretch-slim AS example
- RUN apt-get update && \
- apt-get install -y \
- python3 \
- python3-pip
- COPY requirements.txt .
- RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
- COPY . .
- RUN python3 test.py
- Tamaño: 427MB
- Tiempo: 51s

blocks.title: Diapositiva 10
blocks.md:
- FROM python:3.6-alpine AS example
- RUN apk add --no-cache \
- build-base \
- zlib-dev \
- jpeg-dev \
- libpng-dev
- COPY requirements.txt .
- RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
- COPY . .
- RUN python3 test.py
- Tamaño: 287MB
- Tiempo: 40s

blocks.title: Diapositiva 11
blocks.md:
- FROM python:3.6-alpine AS example
- COPY requirements.txt .
- RUN apk add --no-cache jpeg libpng \
- && \
- apk add --no-cache --virtual .build-deps \
- build-base \
- zlib-dev \
- jpeg-dev \
- libpng-dev \
- && \
- pip3 install -r requirements.txt \
- && \
- apk del .build-deps --force-broken-world
- COPY . .
- RUN python3 test.py
- Tamaño: 123MB
- Tiempo: 34s

blocks.title: Diapositiva 12
blocks.md:
- FROM alpine:3.9 AS example
- RUN apk add --no-cache \
- python3 \
- py3-pillow
- COPY requirements.txt .
- RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
- COPY . .
- RUN python3 test.py
- Tamaño: 64.9MB
- Tiempo: 6s

blocks.title: Dockerrizando el rizo
blocks.md: - Extrae lo importante y descarta el resto

blocks.title: Diapositiva 14
blocks.md:
- FROM alpine:3.9 AS example
- RUN apk add --no-cache python3 py3-pillow
- COPY requirements.txt .
- RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt
- COPY . .
- RUN python3 test.py
- FROM scratch AS result
- COPY --from=example Lenna-blurred.png .
- Tamaño: 310kB
- Tiempo: 26ms

blocks.title: Conclusiones
blocks.md:
- Utiliza Alpine Linux (apk add --no-cache)
- Concatena para reducir el número de capas (&& \)
- Aprovecha la caché entre capas (COPY requirements.txt)
- Extrae solo lo importante (COPY --from)
